metadata.scope_note: Nigeria v1 sector overlay pack. Use together with nigeria_core_control_library for baseline privacy, cybersecurity, governance, evidence, and human-review controls.
metadata.versioning_note: This is a frozen starter snapshot. Do not mutate after use in reports; publish v2025_02 or later for changes.

official_sources_consulted.name: CBN Guidelines on Electronic Banking in Nigeria

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current Nigerian laws, regulations, regulator circulars, directives, codes and guidance before production reliance.

rules.title: Customer due diligence and KYC evidence is present
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence customer identification, verification, due diligence, or KYC controls.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Suspicious transaction reporting or escalation process is documented
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence suspicious transaction monitoring, internal escalation, or reporting controls.

source_basis: CBN AML/CFT Guidelines and supervisory resources
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Sanctions/PEP screening is referenced
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence sanctions, politically exposed persons, watchlist, or adverse-media screening where relevant.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Information security governance is documented
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence security governance, ICT compliance, or information-security responsibility.

source_basis: CBN Guidelines on Electronic Banking in Nigeria
CBN Nigerian Payments System Risk and Information Security materials
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Electronic banking/payment channel controls are present
rules.summary: Digital banking or fintech documents should evidence controls over electronic banking, payment channels, applications, or third-party service providers.

source_basis: CBN Guidelines on Electronic Banking in Nigeria
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Personal data and financial-data privacy handling is documented
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence privacy notices, data protection, lawful processing, consent, confidentiality, or data-subject rights.

source_basis: NDPC Nigeria Data Protection Act GAID 2025
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Consumer complaint and redress mechanism is documented
rules.summary: Banking/fintech customer-facing documents should evidence complaints, dispute resolution, or customer redress channels.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Digital lending registration/compliance evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Digital lending documents should evidence FCCPC registration/licensing/compliance where the business provides digital or non-traditional consumer lending.

source_basis: FCCPC Digital/Electronic/Online or Non-Traditional Consumer Lending Regulations 2025
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: CBN licence, approval, or authorization is referenced
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should evidence the relevant CBN licence, approval, authorization, or regulated status.

metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Corporate registration and regulated-entity identity evidence is present
rules.summary: Banking/fintech documents should include or reference corporate registration, RC number, regulated entity name, or incorporation evidence.

source_basis: General Nigeria corporate registration evidence requirement
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Open banking/API consent and authorization evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Open banking or API-sharing documents should evidence customer consent, authorization, API governance, or participant controls.

source_basis: CBN Operational Guidelines for Open Banking in Nigeria
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.

rules.title: Agent banking or wallet operations controls are present where applicable
rules.summary: Agent banking, wallet, or mobile-money documents should evidence agent oversight, wallet tiering, transaction limits, or scheme controls.

source_basis: CBN Mobile Money/Agent Banking framework materials
metadata.implementation_note: Evidence is text-derived and must be reviewed by a qualified compliance/legal reviewer before reliance.
